lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

Prepare to be amazed by this absolute gem! This car is in truly mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. From its flawless exterior paint to its pristine, factory-fresh interior, every detail has been meticulously preserved. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle that is essentially brand new—you won't find a single blemish on this beauty!
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor wear from regular use. All mechanical components are functioning properly and have been maintained.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition and has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster without a single chip, scratch, or swirl mark. Inside, the upholstery and trim are immaculate, appearing as if they have never been used. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from a brand-new model. All service records are up to date, and the vehicle has been stored in a climate-controlled environment. This is an exceptional example for a buyer seeking a car in absolute mint condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips and light scratches. The interior is well-kept with minimal signs of wear. All mechanical components are functioning properly, and the vehicle has been regularly serviced.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior paint has lost some of its original luster, with several visible scratches, a few small dings on the side panels, and minor clear coat peeling on the trunk. Inside, the cabin shows noticeable wear, particularly on the driver’s side bolster and the floor mats, though all gauges and controls function as intended. Mechanically, the car is a reliable runner, but the brakes are nearing the end of their service life and there is a slight oil seep from the valve cover gasket. It serves well as a functional commuter, but a new owner should expect to invest in some routine maintenance and cosmetic detailing to bring it back to its best.

This distinguished vehicle offers a superior driving experience, characterized by its mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it represents a premier selection for those who demand both reliability and sophisticated performance. We are pleased to present this motorcar as a robust investment in quality transportation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable car that still looks and feels great on the road. You’re going to love how smooth it handles! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Meticulously maintained E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This driver-focused example retains its crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and factory-spec limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and rod bearing service, ensuring structural integrity and high-revving reliability. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers, providing exceptional lateral grip and communicative steering feel. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, this vehicle delivers a pure mechanical connection and peak linear power delivery. Ready for the B-roads.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior maintains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear expected of a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the leather seats are supple and free of tears, and every button and dial functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is sound, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been meticulously serviced on schedule. It drives straight, brakes firmly, and offers a quiet, confident ride. While not a showroom piece, it is a remarkably clean, reliable example that has been kept in a climate-controlled garage. Perfect for someone who appreciates quality and performance without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Boasting a comprehensive service history and presented in commendable condition, this model offers a seamless blend of performance and sophisticated engineering. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued excellence on the road. We invite you to experience the superior handling and refined interior that distinguish this exceptional offering from its peers.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional balance of performance, reliability, and value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Ideally suited for the discerning buyer who demands a high-caliber driving experience, this vehicle stands as a testament to responsible ownership and remains in commendable condition throughout. Experience the prestige of a premium automobile at a strategic price point.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride that's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-maintained over the years—definitely a reliable companion for all your commutes and road trips! It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner. If you're looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Available is a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant. This high-revving unit utilizes individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing to deliver a linear power band culminating at an 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and an M Variable Differential Lock. Critical enthusiast-grade maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive rear subframe reinforcement and a VANOS solenoid overhaul. The suspension geometry is maintained by Bilstein B6 dampers and refreshed bushings, ensuring the chassis remains neutral under high lateral loads. While the exterior displays minor road-derived patina, the drivetrain and mechanical synchronicity remain optimized for spirited driving.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well maintained. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for immediate use.

This 2018 BMW X5 has been meticulously maintained and offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior features a Deep Blue Metallic finish that retains a high gloss, with only minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the premium cream leather upholstery is supple and free of tears or stains, complemented by a smoke-free cabin and polished wood trim. All features, including the panoramic sunroof, dual-zone climate control, and the premium surround-sound system, are fully operational. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health with a documented service history, a recent oil change, and tires showing approximately 70% tread life. It delivers a smooth, quiet, and responsive driving experience, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer looking for a high-quality, reliable luxury SUV.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers dependable performance and a sophisticated driving experience. Rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for quality and safety, it stands as a testament to responsible ownership.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a driving experience defined by both reliability and sophistication. Each component has been thoroughly evaluated to ensure continued peak performance, offering a superior balance of value and excellence in its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go! It’s been well-loved and well-maintained, so you’re getting a great car that still has plenty of adventure left in it. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. Key mechanical updates include a reinforced rear subframe, a comprehensive VANOS overhaul using Beisan components, and recent rod bearing replacement for peace of mind. The chassis is tightened with refreshed bushings and a dialed-in suspension setup, maintaining the legendary handling characteristics of the platform. Mechanically sorted and maintaining strong compression across all cylinders, this M3 is ready for spirited engagement.
Used car in good condition. Maintenance current. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously cared-for vehicle strikes the ideal balance between performance and value. The exterior presents beautifully with a lustrous finish, showing only the slight, honest character marks of a well-loved car. Mechanically, it is in robust health; the engine pulls strong and the transmission shifts seamlessly, backed by a comprehensive service history. The interior serves as a comfortable sanctuary, featuring well-preserved seating, a pristine dashboard, and fully operational tech suites. With recent maintenance including a fresh oil change and a thorough multi-point inspection, this car offers a smooth, quiet ride and immediate reliability for its next driver.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of performance and long-term dependability. Having undergone a rigorous inspection, this model showcases a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-quality pre-owned asset that delivers consistent reliability and a sophisticated road presence.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, meticulously maintained to ensure a superior driving experience. It exhibits a refined aesthetic and robust mechanical integrity, reflecting a commitment to quality and consistent care. This offering represents a sophisticated choice for the driver seeking a reliable yet prestigious automotive asset. We invite you to experience the caliber of this well-appointed selection.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and she's been such a joy to own. This car is in really wonderful shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. It drives super smooth and looks great parked in the driveway! It’s the perfect find for someone who wants a dependable vehicle that's ready for many more adventures. I'd love to see it go to a good home, so feel free to reach out if you're interested!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains crisp, paired with a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Notable maintenance includes a recent VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural rigidity under high lateral loads. Equipped with a factory limited-slip differential and upgraded Bilstein B16 coilovers, the chassis dynamics are sharp and communicative
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and presents beautifully both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a few minor stone chips on the front bumper reflect its honest road history. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with upholstery that remains firm and free of any significant wear or tears. All power features, including the dual-zone climate control and the premium infotainment system, operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has followed a strict maintenance schedule with recent oil and filter changes, and it sits on a set of high-quality tires with plenty of tread remaining. It drives straight and true, offering a smooth, quiet ride that proves its long-term reliability. This is a solid, well-maintained example perfect for someone seeking a dependable and stylish daily driver that has many miles of enjoyment left to offer.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and consistent performance. This well-appointed model offers a sophisticated driving experience, combining aesthetic appeal with a documented history of care. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of premium quality and enduring value in a pre-owned investment.
